title: The Bizarre Esoteric Roots of Modern Space Programs
summary: This brief interview segment discusses the esoteric and unconventional beliefs of early rocket scientists who founded modern space programs, including Russian cosmist Konstantin Tsiolkovsky and American rocket pioneer Jack Parsons, suggesting the origins of space exploration have stranger roots than commonly known.

key_claims.claim: The Russian space program was inspired by Konstantin Tsiolkovsky who constructed his own cosmic religion around space
Tsiolkovsky believed humans would colonize the Milky Way, achieve immortality, regulate forces of nature, and achieve time travel
Jack Parsons was part of the Pasadena OTO cult along with L. Ron Hubbard
Jack Parsons and L. Ron Hubbard performed Sex Magic rituals together
Parsons received a past life regression in which he believed he was Simon Magus
